input.currentText: [fixture] Carbon taxes work where enforcement is durable; Australia's was repealed before measurement, so the generalization is too strong. And the spam analogy fails: spam has technical markers, misinformation is contextual judgment.
input.parentText: [fixture] Carbon taxes always reduce emissions; the BC data proves it. Misinformation is like spam — filter at the platform.
input.threadContextExcerpt: [fixture] Debate room: Policy generalization and analogies. Depth 1 multi-axis dispute.
